en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Kayvaiyane masalaame kay belenge kai makecelre kai madralrangedrange kay vai ngangengerece kay saseverane
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: yakaynay ki cakena ki ubulu kanekane kay pange, laku vaivainay lakaculu kay kinawmasane madu
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: la kivagaku ki ina anika duduli ka subelebelenge
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Ku ina laiyakay, laulri kela ku valrigi.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: kadrwa ku ememe kaymaungu ngiabwale ka tariau.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: sa lri utavananenay ikadalranane lapelaelaku ki tariau ku urikayli
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願，
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: anatumane la kai kela ku valrigi apiakivavangeana naku.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
